	var propName = event.parm1;
	var clickCount = parseInt(gs.getProperty(propName));
	
	var updateCount = clickCount + 1;
	
	gs.setProperty(propName, updateCount);
}());]]></script><synchronous>false</synchronous><sys_class_name>sysevent_script_action</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-06 04:53:43</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>69b0b83b8324431051759650ceaad332</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Track Clicks on PDI homepage</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy>protected</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sysevent_script_action_69b0b83b8324431051759650ceaad332</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-06 04:53:43</sys_updated_on></sysevent_script_action></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sysevent_script_action_ebaea1cf9cd25210f87722436a15f78b
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sysevent_script_action"><sysevent_script_action action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><condition_script/><description/><event_name>system.upgraded</event_name><name>Security fix for SC Shopping Cart Dep</name><order>100</order><script><![CDATA[var scriptPrefix = "fix_security_issue_sc_shopping_cart_deprecated";
gs.info(scriptPrefix + "Started executing the script");
if (!(GlideCollisionDetector.get().containsKey("sp_widget_f3336978dbaca2007f3bf5131f9619ec")))
	addACLChecks();

gs.info(scriptPrefix + "Ended executing the script");

function addACLChecks() {
var script = "(function() {
 var m = data.msgs = {};
 m.createdMsg = gs.getMessage("Created");
 m.trackMsg = gs.getMessage("track using 'Requests' in the header or");
 m.clickMsg = gs.getMessage("click here to view");
 m.cartEmptiedMsg = gs.getMessage("Your cart has been emptied");
 m.itemRemovedMsg = gs.getMessage("has been removed from your cart");
 m.updatedMsq = gs.getMessage("Updated");

 m.quantityToMsg = gs.getMessage("quantity to");
 m.clearCartConfirmationMsg = gs.getMessage("Are you sure you want to empty your cart?");
 var userID = gs.getUser().getID();
 var cart = new SPCart(input.cartName, userID);
 if (input && input.action === "edit_item") {
 data.editVariablesModal = $sp.getWidget('widget-modal', {embeddedWidgetId: 'sp-variable-editor', embeddedWidgetOptions: {sys_id: input.itemID, table: "sc_cart_item", showItemTitle: true, isOrdering: true}});
 return;
 } if (input && input.action === "update_quantity") {
 var cartItemGR = new GlideRecord("sc_cart_item");
 if (cartItemGR.get(input.itemID) && cartItemGR.canWrite()) {
 cartItemGR.setValue("quantity", input.quantity);
 cartItemGR.update();
 } } if (input && input.action === "checkout") { cart.setSpecialInstructions(input.additionalDetails);
 cart.setRequestedFor(input.cart.requested_for);
 cart.setDeliveryAddress(input.deliverTo);
 var request = cart.placeOrder();
 data.requestData = { number: request.getValue("number"), table: request.getTableName(), sys_id: request.getUniqueValue() };
 cart.setSpecialInstructions("");
 cart.setRequestedFor(userID);
 cart.setDeliveryAddress("");
 } if (input && input.action === "remove_item") {
 var itemGR = new GlideRecord('sc_cart_item');
 if (itemGR.get(input.removeItemID) && itemGR.canDelete()) itemGR.deleteRecord();
 } if (input && input.action === "clear_cart") { cart.clearCart();
 } if (input && input.action === "save_cart") {
 var newCart = new SPCart(input.newCartName, userID);
 newCart.loadCart(cart.getCartID());
 } data.sys_properties = { twostep_checkout: gs.getProperty("glide.sc.checkout.twostep", "false") == 'true' };
 var cartID = cart.getCartID();
 data.saveCartModal = $sp.getWidget('widget-modal', {embeddedWidgetId: 'sc_save_bundle', embeddedWidgetOptions: {}});
 data.cart = cart.getCartObj();
 data.cartItems = cart.getItems();
 })();";

	var gr = new GlideRecord("sp_widget");
	if (gr.get("f3336978dbaca2007f3bf5131f9619ec")) {
		gr.setWorkflow(false);
		gr.setUseEngines(false);
		gr.setValue("script", script);
		gr.update();
	}

	var action = new GlideRecord("sysevent_script_action");
	if (action.get("ebaea1cf9cd25210f87722436a15f78b")) {
		action.setValue("active", false);
		action.update();
	}
}]]></script><synchronous>false</synchronous><sys_class_name>sysevent_script_action</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>maint</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2024-12-10 12:56:43</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path/><sys_id>ebaea1cf9cd25210f87722436a15f78b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Security fix for SC Shopping Cart Dep</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Service Portal - Service Catalog (do not activate...see plugin description)" source="com.glide.service-portal.service-catalog">34b0fa8a18b632108bb255f46a373a58</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sysevent_script_action_ebaea1cf9cd25210f87722436a15f78b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>system</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-03 05:23:03</sys_updated_on></sysevent_script_action></record_update>
sys_update_xml.target_name: Security fix for SC Shopping Cart Dep

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE" element="u_emergency_type" table="incident"><active>true</active><array>false</array><attributes/><audit>false</audit><calculation><![CDATA[(function calculatedFieldValue(current) {

})(current);]]></calculation><choice/><choice_field/><choice_table/><column_label>User</column_label><comments/><create_roles/><default_value/><defaultsort/><delete_roles/><dependent/><dependent_on_field/><display>false</display><dynamic_creation>false</dynamic_creation><dynamic_creation_script/><dynamic_default_value/><dynamic_ref_qual/><element>u_user</element><element_reference>false</element_reference><foreign_database/><formula/><function_definition/><function_field>false</function_field><internal_type display_value="Reference">reference</internal_type><mandatory>false</mandatory><max_length>32</max_length><name>u_audit_logging</name><next_element/><primary>false</primary><read_only>false</read_only><read_roles/><reference display_value="" name="sys_user">sys_user</reference><reference_cascade_rule/><reference_floats>false</reference_floats><reference_key/><reference_qual/><reference_qual_condition/><reference_type/><spell_check>false</spell_check><staged>false</staged><sys_class_name>sys_dictionary</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-10 09:35:42</sys_created_on><sys_id>ab67da0583b0031051759650ceaad3c3</sys_id><sys_name>User</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_u_audit_logging_u_user</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-10 09:35:42</sys_updated_on><table_reference>false</table_reference><text_index>false</text_index><unique>false</unique><use_dependent_field>false</use_dependent_field><use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default><use_reference_qualifier>simple</use_reference_qualifier><virtual>false</virtual><virtual_type>script</virtual_type><widget/><write_roles/><xml_view>false</xml_view></sys_dictionary></record_update>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>false</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>sys_cs_collab_member</collection><condition>new SOWSidebarNotificationsUtils().shallSendFirstEmail(current)</condition><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="sys_cs_collab_member">active=true^member_type!=creator^table=incident^EQ<item endquery="false" field="active" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="true"/><item display_value="Creator" endquery="false" field="member_type" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="!=" or="false" value="creator"/><item endquery="false" field="table" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value="incident"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Requestor added to sidebar discussion</name><order>1</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/ ) {
    var incidentGr = current.document.getRefRecord();
    if (incidentGr.isValidRecord()) {
        gs.eventQueue('sn_sow_collab.sidebar.discussion.created', incidentGr, incidentGr.getValue('caller_id'), current.getValue('collab_chat'));
    }
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2023-05-15 10:26:40</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>70f2408a477e61503fbe9e25126d4385</sys_id><sys_mod_count>38</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Requestor added to sidebar discussion</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Collaboration Services for Service Operations Workspace" source="sn_sow_collab">fa27a0dd53423010bf68ddeeff7b12ac</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Collaboration Services for Service Operations Workspace">fa27a0dd53423010bf68ddeeff7b12ac</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_70f2408a477e61503fbe9e25126d4385</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>system</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-03 04:50:42</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=70f2408a477e61503fbe9e25126d4385"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_d8a096c58370031051759650ceaad30c
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="DELETE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil = Class.create();
RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
        this.answer = [];
    },


    /**
     * @param {object} data in the below format
     * {
     *  "sourceInstance": sufffix for the source instance
     * }
     * 
     */
    getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource: function(sourceInstance, updateSetIDs) {
        var log1 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource(), sourceInstance: " + sourceInstance + " updateSetIDs: " + updateSetIDs;
        gs.log(log1);
        this.answer.push(log1);
        var id, gr = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set_source');
        gr.addQuery('name', sourceInstance); //name of the source environment, where actual update sets are available
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next())
            id = gr.getUniqueValue();
        var worker = new GlideUpdateSetWorker();
        worker.setBackground(true);
        worker.setUpdateSourceSysId(id);
        worker.setLimitSet(updateSetIDs.toString());
        worker.start();
        var progress_id = worker.getProgressID();
        var progress = GlideRecord('sys_progress_worker');
        for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            gs.sleep(1000);
            progress.get(progress_id);
            log1 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource() , state: " + progress.state + " , progress_id: " + progress_id + " Poll Number: " + i;
            gs.info(log1);
            this.answer.push(log1);
            if (progress.state == 'complete')
                break;
        }
        return progress_id;
    },


    //OPTIONAL if you have auto preview enabled
    //Auto preview loaded update sets
    AutoPreviewUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames, conflictsResolutionValue) {
        //Query the remote update sets
        if (gs.nil(updateSetNames))
            return;

        var remote_updateset = new GlideRecord('sys_remote_update_set');
        remote_updateset.addQuery('sys_class_name=sys_remote_update_set^nameIN' + updateSetNames);
        remote_updateset.query();
        this.answer.push("Number of update sets found during AutoPreview:" + remote_updateset.getRowCount());
        while (remote_updateset.next()) {
            if (!remote_updateset.sys_id.nil()) {
                //update state of selected update sets to preview
                if (remote_updateset.state == 'loaded') { //eliminate invalid status
                    remote_updateset.state = "previewed";
                    remote_updateset.update();
                    // run previwer job
                    var t = new UpdateSetPreviewer();
                    t.removePreviewRecords(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                    t.generatePreviewRecords(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                }
            }

            if ((conflictsResolutionValue == "ignored" || conflictsResolutionValue == "skipped") && GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id)) {
                this.answer.push("Update sets conflicts found");
                this.resolveConflicts(remote_updateset.sys_id, conflictsResolutionValue);
            }
        }
    },


    // Resolved the preview/conflict errors with given resolution value
    resolveConflicts: function(remoteUpdateSetSysId, conflictsResolutionValue) {

        var problemResolutionGr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_preview_problem");
        problemResolutionGr.addEncodedQuery("remote_update_set=" + remoteUpdateSetSysId);
        problemResolutionGr.query();

        while (problemResolutionGr.next()) {
            problemResolutionGr.setValue("status", conflictsResolutionValue); // ignored = "Accept remote update" & skipped = "Skip remote update"
            problemResolutionGr.update();
        }
    },


    //Commit previewed updates 
    commitRemoteUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames) {
        if (gs.nil(updateSetNames))
            return;
        var worker = new GlideUpdateSetWorker();
        var remote_updateset = new GlideRecord('sys_remote_update_set');
        remote_updateset.addQuery('sys_class_name=sys_remote_update_set^nameIN' + updateSetNames);
        remote_updateset.query();
        this.answer.push("Query for commitRemoteUpdateSets" + remote_updateset.getEncodedQuery() + " count " + remote_updateset.getRowCount());
        while (remote_updateset.next()) {

            if (!remote_updateset.sys_id.nil() && remote_updateset.state == 'previewed') {
                var log2 = "commitRemoteUpdateSets count: " + remote_updateset.sys_id.nil() + "  issues: " + GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                gs.info(log2);
                this.answer.push(log2);
                //check updateset issues are fixed
                if (!GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id)) {
                    var sys_up_set = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set');
                    var local_sys_id = worker.remoteUpdateSetCommit(sys_up_set, remote_updateset, remote_updateset.update_source.url);
                    log2 = "commitRemoteUpdateSets , local_sys_id " + local_sys_id + " remote_updateset.sys_id: " + remote_updateset.sys_id;
                    gs.info(log2);
                    this.answer.push(log2);
                    var xml_gr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_xml");
                    xml_gr.addQuery("remote_update_set", remote_updateset.sys_id);
                    xml_gr.query();
                    this.answer.push("Query for commiting update sets (sys_update_xml): " + xml_gr.getEncodedQuery() + " , count: " + xml_gr.getRowCount());
                    //execute commit and XML installtion
                    while (xml_gr.next()) {
                        var local_xml_gr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_xml");
                        local_xml_gr.initialize();
                        local_xml_gr.name = xml_gr.name;
                        local_xml_gr.payload = xml_gr.payload;
                        local_xml_gr.action = xml_gr.action;
                        local_xml_gr.type = xml_gr.type;
                        local_xml_gr.target_name = xml_gr.target_name;
                        local_xml_gr.view = xml_gr.view;
                        local_xml_gr.update_domain = xml_gr.update_domain;
                        local_xml_gr.table = xml_gr.table;
                        local_xml_gr.category = xml_gr.category;
                        local_xml_gr.application = xml_gr.application;
                        local_xml_gr.update_set = local_sys_id;
                        if (local_xml_gr.isValidField('replace_on_upgrade'))
                            local_xml_gr.replace_on_upgrade = xml_gr.replace_on_upgrade;
                        local_xml_gr.insert();
                    }
                    remote_updateset.update();
                    worker.setUpdateSetSysId(local_sys_id);
                    worker.setBackground(false);
                    gs.log("Worker ProgressID: " + worker.getProgressID());
                    worker.start();
                }
            }
        }

        var progress_id = worker.getProgressID();
        var progressGr = GlideRecord('sys_progress_worker');
        for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            gs.sleep(1000);
            progressGr.get(progress_id);
            log2 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: commitRemoteUpdateSets() , state: " + progressGr.state + " , progress_id: " + progress_id;
            gs.info(log2);
            this.answer.push(log2);
            if (!progress_id) {
                log2 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: commitRemoteUpdateSets() , No update set found to commit";
                gs.info(log2);
                this.answer.push(log2);
				break;
            }
            if (progressGr.state == 'complete')
                break;
        }

    },


    cleanUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames) {

        // remove the local update sets in PDI
        var updateSetGr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_set");
        updateSetGr.addEncodedQuery("nameIN" + updateSetNames);
        updateSetGr.query();

        if (updateSetGr.next())
            updateSetGr.deleteMultiple();

        // remove the retrieved update sets in PDI
        var remoteUpdateSetGr = new GlideRecord("sys_remote_update_set");
        remoteUpdateSetGr.addQuery("nameIN" + updateSetNames);
        remoteUpdateSetGr.query();
        this.answer.push("Update sets to be cleaned:" + remoteUpdateSetGr.getRowCount());

        if (remoteUpdateSetGr.next())
            recordsDeleted = remoteUpdateSetGr.deleteMultiple();
    },
    getAuditLogs: function() {
        return this.answer;
    },
    type: 'RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-10 09:05:12</sys_created_on><sys_id>d8a096c58370031051759650ceaad30c</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy>protected</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_d8a096c58370031051759650ceaad30c</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-10 09:05:12</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_082a87278360031051759650ceaad395
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="DELETE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil = Class.create();
RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
        this.answer = [];
    },


    /**
     * @param {object} data in the below format
     * {
     *  "sourceInstance": sufffix for the source instance
     * }
     * 
     */
    getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource: function(sourceInstance, updateSetIDs) {
        var log1 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource(), sourceInstance: " + sourceInstance + " updateSetIDs: " + updateSetIDs;
        gs.log(log1);
        this.answer.push(log1);
        var id, gr = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set_source');
        gr.addQuery('name', sourceInstance); //name of the source environment, where actual update sets are available
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next())
            id = gr.getUniqueValue();
        var worker = new GlideUpdateSetWorker();
        worker.setBackground(true);
        worker.setUpdateSourceSysId(id);
        worker.setLimitSet(updateSetIDs.toString());
        worker.start();
        var progress_id = worker.getProgressID();
        var progress = GlideRecord('sys_progress_worker');
        for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            gs.sleep(1000);
            progress.get(progress_id);
            log1 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource() , state: " + progress.state + " , progress_id: " + progress_id + " Poll Number: " + i;
            gs.info(log1);
            this.answer.push(log1);
            if (progress.state == 'complete')
                break;
        }
        return progress_id;
    },


    //OPTIONAL if you have auto preview enabled
    //Auto preview loaded update sets
    AutoPreviewUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames, conflictsResolutionValue) {
        //Query the remote update sets
        if (gs.nil(updateSetNames))
            return;

        var remote_updateset = new GlideRecord('sys_remote_update_set');
        remote_updateset.addQuery('sys_class_name=sys_remote_update_set^nameIN' + updateSetNames);
        remote_updateset.query();
        this.answer.push("Number of update sets found during AutoPreview:" + remote_updateset.getRowCount());
        while (remote_updateset.next()) {
            if (!remote_updateset.sys_id.nil()) {
                //update state of selected update sets to preview
                if (remote_updateset.state == 'loaded') { //eliminate invalid status
                    remote_updateset.state = "previewed";
                    remote_updateset.update();
                    // run previwer job
                    var t = new UpdateSetPreviewer();
                    t.removePreviewRecords(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                    t.generatePreviewRecords(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                }
            }

            if ((conflictsResolutionValue == "ignored" || conflictsResolutionValue == "skipped") && GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id)) {
                this.answer.push("Update sets conflicts found");
                this.resolveConflicts(remote_updateset.sys_id, conflictsResolutionValue);
            }
        }
    },


    // Resolved the preview/conflict errors with given resolution value
    resolveConflicts: function(remoteUpdateSetSysId, conflictsResolutionValue) {

        var problemResolutionGr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_preview_problem");
        problemResolutionGr.addEncodedQuery("remote_update_set=" + remoteUpdateSetSysId);
        problemResolutionGr.query();

        while (problemResolutionGr.next()) {
            problemResolutionGr.setValue("status", conflictsResolutionValue); // ignored = "Accept remote update" & skipped = "Skip remote update"
            problemResolutionGr.update();
        }
    },


    //Commit previewed updates 
    commitRemoteUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames) {
        if (gs.nil(updateSetNames))
            return;
        var worker = new GlideUpdateSetWorker();
        var remote_updateset = new GlideRecord('sys_remote_update_set');
        remote_updateset.addQuery('sys_class_name=sys_remote_update_set^nameIN' + updateSetNames);
        remote_updateset.query();
        this.answer.push("Query for commitRemoteUpdateSets" + remote_updateset.getEncodedQuery() + " count " + remote_updateset.getRowCount());
        while (remote_updateset.next()) {

            if (!remote_updateset.sys_id.nil() && remote_updateset.state == 'previewed') {
                var log2 = "commitRemoteUpdateSets count: " + remote_updateset.sys_id.nil() + "  issues: " + GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                gs.info(log2);
                this.answer.push(log2);
                //check updateset issues are fixed
                if (!GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id)) {
                    var sys_up_set = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set');
                    var local_sys_id = worker.remoteUpdateSetCommit(sys_up_set, remote_updateset, remote_updateset.update_source.url);
                    log2 = "commitRemoteUpdateSets , local_sys_id " + local_sys_id + " remote_updateset.sys_id: " + remote_updateset.sys_id;
                    gs.info(log2);
                    this.answer.push(log2);
                    var xml_gr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_xml");
                    xml_gr.addQuery("remote_update_set", remote_updateset.sys_id);
                    xml_gr.query();
                    this.answer.push("Query for commiting update sets (sys_update_xml): " + xml_gr.getEncodedQuery() + " , count: " + xml_gr.getRowCount());
                    //execute commit and XML installtion
                    while (xml_gr.next()) {
                        var local_xml_gr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_xml");
                        local_xml_gr.initialize();
                        local_xml_gr.name = xml_gr.name;
                        local_xml_gr.payload = xml_gr.payload;
                        local_xml_gr.action = xml_gr.action;
                        local_xml_gr.type = xml_gr.type;
                        local_xml_gr.target_name = xml_gr.target_name;
                        local_xml_gr.view = xml_gr.view;
                        local_xml_gr.update_domain = xml_gr.update_domain;
                        local_xml_gr.table = xml_gr.table;
                        local_xml_gr.category = xml_gr.category;
                        local_xml_gr.application = xml_gr.application;
                        local_xml_gr.update_set = local_sys_id;
                        if (local_xml_gr.isValidField('replace_on_upgrade'))
                            local_xml_gr.replace_on_upgrade = xml_gr.replace_on_upgrade;
                        local_xml_gr.insert();
                    }
                    remote_updateset.update();
                    worker.setUpdateSetSysId(local_sys_id);
                    worker.setBackground(false);
                    gs.log("Worker ProgressID: " + worker.getProgressID());
                    worker.start();
                }
            }
        }

        var progress_id = worker.getProgressID();
        var progressGr = GlideRecord('sys_progress_worker');
        for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            gs.sleep(1000);
            progressGr.get(progress_id);
            log2 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: commitRemoteUpdateSets() , state: " + progressGr.state + " , progress_id: " + progress_id;
            gs.info(log2);
            this.answer.push(log2);
            if (!progress_id) {
                log2 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: commitRemoteUpdateSets() , No update set found to commit";
                gs.info(log2);
                this.answer.push(log2);
				break;
            }
            if (progressGr.state == 'complete')
                break;
        }

    },


    cleanUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames) {

        // remove the local update sets in PDI
        var updateSetGr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_set");
        updateSetGr.addEncodedQuery("nameIN" + updateSetNames);
        updateSetGr.query();

        if (updateSetGr.next())
            updateSetGr.deleteMultiple();

        // remove the retrieved update sets in PDI
        var remoteUpdateSetGr = new GlideRecord("sys_remote_update_set");
        remoteUpdateSetGr.addQuery("nameIN" + updateSetNames);
        remoteUpdateSetGr.query();
        this.answer.push("Update sets to be cleaned:" + remoteUpdateSetGr.getRowCount());

        if (remoteUpdateSetGr.next())
            recordsDeleted = remoteUpdateSetGr.deleteMultiple();
    },
    getAuditLogs: function() {
        return this.answer;
    },
    type: 'RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-05 21:25:31</sys_created_on><sys_id>082a87278360031051759650ceaad395</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy>protected</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_082a87278360031051759650ceaad395</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-05 21:25:31</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_9753f8bf8324431051759650ceaad3ff
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="DELETE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil = Class.create();
RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
        this.answer = [];
    },


    /**
     * @param {object} data in the below format
     * {
     *  "sourceInstance": sufffix for the source instance
     * }
     * 
     */
    getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource: function(sourceInstance, updateSetIDs) {
        var log1 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource(), sourceInstance: " + sourceInstance + " updateSetIDs: " + updateSetIDs;
        gs.log(log1);
        this.answer.push(log1);
        var id, gr = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set_source');
        gr.addQuery('name', sourceInstance); //name of the source environment, where actual update sets are available
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next())
            id = gr.getUniqueValue();
        var worker = new GlideUpdateSetWorker();
        worker.setBackground(true);
        worker.setUpdateSourceSysId(id);
        worker.setLimitSet(updateSetIDs.toString());
        worker.start();
        var progress_id = worker.getProgressID();
        var progress = GlideRecord('sys_progress_worker');
        for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            gs.sleep(1000);
            progress.get(progress_id);
            log1 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource() , state: " + progress.state + " , progress_id: " + progress_id + " Poll Number: " + i;
            gs.info(log1);
            this.answer.push(log1);
            if (progress.state == 'complete')
                break;
        }
        return progress_id;
    },


    //OPTIONAL if you have auto preview enabled
    //Auto preview loaded update sets
    AutoPreviewUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames, conflictsResolutionValue) {
        //Query the remote update sets
        if (gs.nil(updateSetNames))
            return;

        var remote_updateset = new GlideRecord('sys_remote_update_set');
        remote_updateset.addQuery('sys_class_name=sys_remote_update_set^nameIN' + updateSetNames);
        remote_updateset.query();
        this.answer.push("Number of update sets found during AutoPreview:" + remote_updateset.getRowCount());
        while (remote_updateset.next()) {
            if (!remote_updateset.sys_id.nil()) {
                //update state of selected update sets to preview
                if (remote_updateset.state == 'loaded') { //eliminate invalid status
                    remote_updateset.state = "previewed";
                    remote_updateset.update();
                    // run previwer job
                    var t = new UpdateSetPreviewer();
                    t.removePreviewRecords(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                    t.generatePreviewRecords(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                }
            }

            if ((conflictsResolutionValue == "ignored" || conflictsResolutionValue == "skipped") && GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id)) {
                this.answer.push("Update sets conflicts found");
                this.resolveConflicts(remote_updateset.sys_id, conflictsResolutionValue);
            }
        }
    },


    // Resolved the preview/conflict errors with given resolution value
    resolveConflicts: function(remoteUpdateSetSysId, conflictsResolutionValue) {

        var problemResolutionGr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_preview_problem");
        problemResolutionGr.addEncodedQuery("remote_update_set=" + remoteUpdateSetSysId);
        problemResolutionGr.query();

        while (problemResolutionGr.next()) {
            problemResolutionGr.setValue("status", conflictsResolutionValue); // ignored = "Accept remote update" & skipped = "Skip remote update"
            problemResolutionGr.update();
        }
    },


    //Commit previewed updates 
    commitRemoteUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames) {
        if (gs.nil(updateSetNames))
            return;
        var worker = new GlideUpdateSetWorker();
        var remote_updateset = new GlideRecord('sys_remote_update_set');
        remote_updateset.addQuery('sys_class_name=sys_remote_update_set^nameIN' + updateSetNames);
        remote_updateset.query();
        this.answer.push("Query for commitRemoteUpdateSets" + remote_updateset.getEncodedQuery() + " count " + remote_updateset.getRowCount());
        while (remote_updateset.next()) {

            if (!remote_updateset.sys_id.nil() && remote_updateset.state == 'previewed') {
                var log2 = "commitRemoteUpdateSets count: " + remote_updateset.sys_id.nil() + "  issues: " + GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                gs.info(log2);
                this.answer.push(log2);
                //check updateset issues are fixed
                if (!GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id)) {
                    var sys_up_set = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set');
                    var local_sys_id = worker.remoteUpdateSetCommit(sys_up_set, remote_updateset, remote_updateset.update_source.url);
                    log2 = "commitRemoteUpdateSets , local_sys_id " + local_sys_id + " remote_updateset.sys_id: " + remote_updateset.sys_id;
                    gs.info(log2);
                    this.answer.push(log2);
                    var xml_gr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_xml");
                    xml_gr.addQuery("remote_update_set", remote_updateset.sys_id);
                    xml_gr.query();
                    this.answer.push("Query for commiting update sets (sys_update_xml): " + xml_gr.getEncodedQuery() + " , count: " + xml_gr.getRowCount());
                    //execute commit and XML installtion
                    while (xml_gr.next()) {
                        var local_xml_gr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_xml");
                        local_xml_gr.initialize();
                        local_xml_gr.name = xml_gr.name;
                        local_xml_gr.payload = xml_gr.payload;
                        local_xml_gr.action = xml_gr.action;
                        local_xml_gr.type = xml_gr.type;
                        local_xml_gr.target_name = xml_gr.target_name;
                        local_xml_gr.view = xml_gr.view;
                        local_xml_gr.update_domain = xml_gr.update_domain;
                        local_xml_gr.table = xml_gr.table;
                        local_xml_gr.category = xml_gr.category;
                        local_xml_gr.application = xml_gr.application;
                        local_xml_gr.update_set = local_sys_id;
                        if (local_xml_gr.isValidField('replace_on_upgrade'))
                            local_xml_gr.replace_on_upgrade = xml_gr.replace_on_upgrade;
                        local_xml_gr.insert();
                    }
                    remote_updateset.update();
                    worker.setUpdateSetSysId(local_sys_id);
                    worker.setBackground(false);
                    gs.log("Worker ProgressID: " + worker.getProgressID());
                    worker.start();
                }
            }
        }

        var progress_id = worker.getProgressID();
        var progressGr = GlideRecord('sys_progress_worker');
        for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            gs.sleep(1000);
            progressGr.get(progress_id);
            log2 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: commitRemoteUpdateSets() , state: " + progressGr.state + " , progress_id: " + progress_id;
            gs.info(log2);
            this.answer.push(log2);
            if (!progress_id) {
                log2 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: commitRemoteUpdateSets() , No update set found to commit";
                gs.info(log2);
                this.answer.push(log2);
				break;
            }
            if (progressGr.state == 'complete')
                break;
        }

    },


    cleanUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames) {

        // remove the local update sets in PDI
        var updateSetGr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_set");
        updateSetGr.addEncodedQuery("nameIN" + updateSetNames);
        updateSetGr.query();

        if (updateSetGr.next())
            updateSetGr.deleteMultiple();

        // remove the retrieved update sets in PDI
        var remoteUpdateSetGr = new GlideRecord("sys_remote_update_set");
        remoteUpdateSetGr.addQuery("nameIN" + updateSetNames);
        remoteUpdateSetGr.query();
        this.answer.push("Update sets to be cleaned:" + remoteUpdateSetGr.getRowCount());

        if (remoteUpdateSetGr.next())
            recordsDeleted = remoteUpdateSetGr.deleteMultiple();
    },
    getAuditLogs: function() {
        return this.answer;
    },
    type: 'RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-06 05:05:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>9753f8bf8324431051759650ceaad3ff</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy>protected</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_9753f8bf8324431051759650ceaad3ff</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-06 05:05:19</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description>Allow report_view for records in sys_resolutionshaper_config, for users with role sn_esm_agent.</description><local_or_existing>Existing</local_or_existing><name>sys_resolutionshaper_config</name><operation display_value="report_view">0997ab83733303005978e4b9cdf6a7b9</operation><script><![CDATA[answer = gs.getSession().isLoggedIn();
if (!answer) {
    answer = gs.getProperty('glide.security.allow_unauth_roleless_acl', false);
}]]></script><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2025-05-08 04:43:54</sys_created_on><sys_id>85451fb6ff11221064eaffffffffff7a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>sys_resolutionshaper_config</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Resolution Shaper" source="sn_res_shaper">43302824d73002004f1e82285e6103e4</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Resolution Shaper">43302824d73002004f1e82285e6103e4</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_85451fb6ff11221064eaffffffffff7a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>system</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-03 05:22:56</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>

	if (current.operation() == 'delete' || current.active.changesTo(false)){
		new AisDisableSearchSignalEvent().disable(current.sys_id);
	}
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2024-09-06 22:31:39</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>80d5eea043a8121020e9145f15b8f269</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Disable sys_pd_activity_definition inact</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Workflow Studio" source="sn_workflow_studio">ae5cba824353e110f8abe279fcb8f258</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Workflow Studio">ae5cba824353e110f8abe279fcb8f258</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_80d5eea043a8121020e9145f15b8f269</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2024-09-06 22:31:39</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=80d5eea043a8121020e9145f15b8f269"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_df1f8ec18370031051759650ceaad3a9
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="DELETE"><access>package_private</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil = Class.create();
RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {
        this.answer = [];
    },


    /**
     * @param {object} data in the below format
     * {
     *  "sourceInstance": sufffix for the source instance
     * }
     * 
     */
    getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource: function(sourceInstance, updateSetIDs) {
        var log1 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource(), sourceInstance: " + sourceInstance + " updateSetIDs: " + updateSetIDs;
        gs.log(log1);
        this.answer.push(log1);
        var id, gr = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set_source');
        gr.addQuery('name', sourceInstance); //name of the source environment, where actual update sets are available
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next())
            id = gr.getUniqueValue();
        var worker = new GlideUpdateSetWorker();
        worker.setBackground(true);
        worker.setUpdateSourceSysId(id);
        worker.setLimitSet(updateSetIDs.toString());
        worker.start();
        var progress_id = worker.getProgressID();
        var progress = GlideRecord('sys_progress_worker');
        for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            gs.sleep(1000);
            progress.get(progress_id);
            log1 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: getCompletedUpdateSetsFromSource() , state: " + progress.state + " , progress_id: " + progress_id + " Poll Number: " + i;
            gs.info(log1);
            this.answer.push(log1);
            if (progress.state == 'complete')
                break;
        }
        return progress_id;
    },


    //OPTIONAL if you have auto preview enabled
    //Auto preview loaded update sets
    AutoPreviewUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames, conflictsResolutionValue) {
        //Query the remote update sets
        if (gs.nil(updateSetNames))
            return;

        var remote_updateset = new GlideRecord('sys_remote_update_set');
        remote_updateset.addQuery('sys_class_name=sys_remote_update_set^nameIN' + updateSetNames);
        remote_updateset.query();
        this.answer.push("Number of update sets found during AutoPreview:" + remote_updateset.getRowCount());
        while (remote_updateset.next()) {
            if (!remote_updateset.sys_id.nil()) {
                //update state of selected update sets to preview
                if (remote_updateset.state == 'loaded') { //eliminate invalid status
                    remote_updateset.state = "previewed";
                    remote_updateset.update();
                    // run previwer job
                    var t = new UpdateSetPreviewer();
                    t.removePreviewRecords(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                    t.generatePreviewRecords(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                }
            }

            if ((conflictsResolutionValue == "ignored" || conflictsResolutionValue == "skipped") && GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id)) {
                this.answer.push("Update sets conflicts found");
                this.resolveConflicts(remote_updateset.sys_id, conflictsResolutionValue);
            }
        }
    },


    // Resolved the preview/conflict errors with given resolution value
    resolveConflicts: function(remoteUpdateSetSysId, conflictsResolutionValue) {

        var problemResolutionGr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_preview_problem");
        problemResolutionGr.addEncodedQuery("remote_update_set=" + remoteUpdateSetSysId);
        problemResolutionGr.query();

        while (problemResolutionGr.next()) {
            problemResolutionGr.setValue("status", conflictsResolutionValue); // ignored = "Accept remote update" & skipped = "Skip remote update"
            problemResolutionGr.update();
        }
    },


    //Commit previewed updates 
    commitRemoteUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames) {
        if (gs.nil(updateSetNames))
            return;
        var worker = new GlideUpdateSetWorker();
        var remote_updateset = new GlideRecord('sys_remote_update_set');
        remote_updateset.addQuery('sys_class_name=sys_remote_update_set^nameIN' + updateSetNames);
        remote_updateset.query();
        this.answer.push("Query for commitRemoteUpdateSets" + remote_updateset.getEncodedQuery() + " count " + remote_updateset.getRowCount());
        while (remote_updateset.next()) {

            if (!remote_updateset.sys_id.nil() && remote_updateset.state == 'previewed') {
                var log2 = "commitRemoteUpdateSets count: " + remote_updateset.sys_id.nil() + "  issues: " + GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id);
                gs.info(log2);
                this.answer.push(log2);
                //check updateset issues are fixed
                if (!GlidePreviewProblemHandler.hasUnresolvedProblems(remote_updateset.sys_id)) {
                    var sys_up_set = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set');
                    var local_sys_id = worker.remoteUpdateSetCommit(sys_up_set, remote_updateset, remote_updateset.update_source.url);
                    log2 = "commitRemoteUpdateSets , local_sys_id " + local_sys_id + " remote_updateset.sys_id: " + remote_updateset.sys_id;
                    gs.info(log2);
                    this.answer.push(log2);
                    var xml_gr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_xml");
                    xml_gr.addQuery("remote_update_set", remote_updateset.sys_id);
                    xml_gr.query();
                    this.answer.push("Query for commiting update sets (sys_update_xml): " + xml_gr.getEncodedQuery() + " , count: " + xml_gr.getRowCount());
                    //execute commit and XML installtion
                    while (xml_gr.next()) {
                        var local_xml_gr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_xml");
                        local_xml_gr.initialize();
                        local_xml_gr.name = xml_gr.name;
                        local_xml_gr.payload = xml_gr.payload;
                        local_xml_gr.action = xml_gr.action;
                        local_xml_gr.type = xml_gr.type;
                        local_xml_gr.target_name = xml_gr.target_name;
                        local_xml_gr.view = xml_gr.view;
                        local_xml_gr.update_domain = xml_gr.update_domain;
                        local_xml_gr.table = xml_gr.table;
                        local_xml_gr.category = xml_gr.category;
                        local_xml_gr.application = xml_gr.application;
                        local_xml_gr.update_set = local_sys_id;
                        if (local_xml_gr.isValidField('replace_on_upgrade'))
                            local_xml_gr.replace_on_upgrade = xml_gr.replace_on_upgrade;
                        local_xml_gr.insert();
                    }
                    remote_updateset.update();
                    worker.setUpdateSetSysId(local_sys_id);
                    worker.setBackground(false);
                    gs.log("Worker ProgressID: " + worker.getProgressID());
                    worker.start();
                }
            }
        }

        var progress_id = worker.getProgressID();
        var progressGr = GlideRecord('sys_progress_worker');
        for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            gs.sleep(1000);
            progressGr.get(progress_id);
            log2 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: commitRemoteUpdateSets() , state: " + progressGr.state + " , progress_id: " + progress_id;
            gs.info(log2);
            this.answer.push(log2);
            if (!progress_id) {
                log2 = "RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil:: commitRemoteUpdateSets() , No update set found to commit";
                gs.info(log2);
                this.answer.push(log2);
				break;
            }
            if (progressGr.state == 'complete')
                break;
        }

    },


    cleanUpdateSets: function(updateSetNames) {

        // remove the local update sets in PDI
        var updateSetGr = new GlideRecord("sys_update_set");
        updateSetGr.addEncodedQuery("nameIN" + updateSetNames);
        updateSetGr.query();

        if (updateSetGr.next())
            updateSetGr.deleteMultiple();

        // remove the retrieved update sets in PDI
        var remoteUpdateSetGr = new GlideRecord("sys_remote_update_set");
        remoteUpdateSetGr.addQuery("nameIN" + updateSetNames);
        remoteUpdateSetGr.query();
        this.answer.push("Update sets to be cleaned:" + remoteUpdateSetGr.getRowCount());

        if (remoteUpdateSetGr.next())
            recordsDeleted = remoteUpdateSetGr.deleteMultiple();
    },
    getAuditLogs: function() {
        return this.answer;
    },
    type: 'RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-10 08:58:35</sys_created_on><sys_id>df1f8ec18370031051759650ceaad3a9</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>RemoteUpdateSetsDeploymentUtil</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy>protected</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_df1f8ec18370031051759650ceaad3a9</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>developer.program.hop@snc</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-10 08:58:35</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ui_page"><sys_ui_page action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><category>general</category><client_script><![CDATA[var origin = window.location.origin;
var redirectionLinkMap = {
    devStudio: origin +
        '/$studio.do?sysparm_transaction_scope=global&sysparm_nostack=true',
    aes: origin + '/now/appenginestudio/home',
    flowDesigner: origin + '/$flow-designer.do?sysparm_nostack=true#/',
    integrationHub: origin +
        '/$pa_dashboard.do?sysparm_dashboard=cd9daf050f1033002a56657eef767ea8',
    uiBuilder: origin + '/now/builder/ui',
    processAutomationDesigner: 'https://docs.servicenow.com/bundle/paris-servicenow-platform/page/administer/process-automation-designer/task/design-automated-process.html',
    mobileStudio: origin +
        '/$studio.do?sysparm_transaction_scope=global&sysparm_nostack=true',
    conversationalInterface: '',
    checkoutApi: 'https://developer.servicenow.com/dev.do#!/reference',
    readDocumentation: 'https://docs.servicenow.com/',
    creatorStudio: origin + '/now/creatorstudio/home',
	servicenowStudio: origin + '/now/servicenow-studio/home',
	servicenowIDE: origin + "/sn_glider_app/ide.do"
};

function navigateToApplication(applicationName) {
    window.open(redirectionLinkMap[applicationName], '_blank');
}

function getResponse(response) {
    var answer = response.responseXML.documentElement.getAttribute("answer");
}

function trackClickEvents(propName) {
    var ga = new GlideAjax('DevUpdateTrackerClicks');
    ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'triggerUpdateClickEvent');
    ga.addParam('sysparm_parm1', propName);
    ga.getXML(getResponse);
}]]></client_script><description/><direct>false</direct><endpoint/><html><![CDATA[<html lang="en" class="no-js">

    <style>
        a,
        button,
        input,
        select,
        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4,
        h5,
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            border: none;
            text-decoration: none;
            background: none;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
        }

        menu,
        ol,
        ul {
            list-style-type: none;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        button {
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        .pdi-homepage {
            overflow: auto;
        }

        /* Container for flexboxes */
        .pdi-home-row {
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0;
            list-style: none;
            /* border: 1px solid silver; */
            -ms-box-orient: horizontal;
            display: -webkit-box;
            display: -moz-box;
            display: -ms-flexbox;
            display: -moz-flex;
            display: -webkit-flex;
            display: flex;
        }

        .pdi-home-row {
            -webkit-flex-wrap: wrap;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            padding-bottom: 36px;
        }

        .pdi-home-column {
            width: 45%;
            /* min-height: 430px; */
            /* margin: 0 auto; */
        }

        .pdi-homepage__illustration div {
            width: 50%;
        }

        @media screen and (max-width: 830px) {
            .pdi-home-column {
                width: 80%;
                /* min-height: 430px; */
                /* margin: 0 auto; */
            }
        }

        @media screen and (max-width: 1100px) {
            .pdi-homepage__illustration div {
                width: auto;
            }
        }

        /* .pdi-home-column:nth-child(odd) {
        margin: 32px auto;
    }

    .pdi-home-column:nth-child(even) {
        margin: auto 32px;
    } */
        /* .pdi-home-column:last-child {
        margin: auto 30px;
    } */
        body {
            padding: 0 !important;
        }

        .btn:focus {
            box-shadow: none !important;
        }

        .last-child {
            float: right;
        }

        .pdi-homepage__frame-12 div {
            white-space: nowrap;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            overflow: hidden;

            @supports (-webkit-line-clamp: 2) {
                overflow: hidden;
                text-overflow: ellipsis;
                white-space: initial;
                display: -webkit-box;
                -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
                -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            }
        }
    </style>

sys_update_xml.name: sysevent_script_action_d28b5c06eb463010506f7558b552281f
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sysevent_script_action"><sysevent_script_action action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><condition_script/><description/><event_name>system.upgraded</event_name><name>OpenNLUPredictIntentFeedbackUpdates</name><order>100</order><script><![CDATA[gs.info("Starting update of the OpenNLUPredictIntentFeedback table to populate the NLU Discovery Outcome field");
try {
	var api = new UpdateNLUDiscoveryOutcomes();
	api.updateNluDiscoveryOutcomes();
} catch (ex) {
	gs.info("Error running updateNluDiscoveryOutcomes() : " + ex.toString());
}

// Set this record to false so that it does not run again
var gr = new GlideRecord("sysevent_script_action");
gr.addQuery("sys_id", "d28b5c06eb463010506f7558b552281f"); // Sysid of this record
gr.query();
if (gr.next()) {
	gr.setValue("active", false);
	gr.update();
}

gs.info("Completed update of the OpenNLUPredictIntentFeedback table");

]]></script><synchronous>false</synchronous><sys_class_name>sysevent_script_action</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-08-19 16:46:48</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>d28b5c06eb463010506f7558b552281f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>28</sys_mod_count><sys_name>OpenNLUPredictIntentFeedbackUpdates</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Glide Conversation Server" source="com.glide.cs">37e6728a183e32108bb255f46a373a91</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sysevent_script_action_d28b5c06eb463010506f7558b552281f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>system</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-03 05:22:57</sys_updated_on></sysevent_script_action></record_update>

action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_hub_step_instance</document><document_key>01cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad30f</document_key><order>600</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-10 06:28:31</sys_created_on><sys_id>49cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad326</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-10 06:29:48</sys_updated_on><value>// Action 1: AI Classification

var incRec = inputs.incident_record;

var result = new EmergencyAIClassifier().classify(
    incRec.description,
    incRec.u_village
);

var gr = new GlideRecord('incident');

if (gr.get(incRec.sys_id)) {

    gr.setValue('u_village', result.village);

    gr.setValue('u_district', result.district);

    gr.setValue('u_emergency_type', result.emergency_type);

    gr.setValue('u_severity', result.severity);

    gr.setValue('u_ai_classification', result.summary);

    // Auto Priority Mapping

    if(result.severity == 'critical'){

        gr.setValue('impact', '1');
        gr.setValue('urgency', '1');
        gr.setValue('priority', '1');

    }
    else if(result.severity == 'high'){

        gr.setValue('impact', '1');
        gr.setValue('urgency', '2');
        gr.setValue('priority', '2');

    }
    else if(result.severity == 'medium'){

        gr.setValue('impact', '2');
        gr.setValue('urgency', '2');
        gr.setValue('priority', '3');

    }
    else{

        gr.setValue('impact', '3');
        gr.setValue('urgency', '3');
        gr.setValue('priority', '5');
    }

    gr.update();
}</value><variable display_value="Script">71aa7f6647032200b4fad7527c9a719b</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_hub_step_instance</document><document_key>01cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad30f</document_key><order>400</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-10 06:28:31</sys_created_on><sys_id>89cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad325</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-10 06:28:31</sys_updated_on><value>35aa573fd7802200bdbaee5b5e610375</value><variable display_value="MID Application">f5e56d79b3101300176b051a16a8dce4</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_element_mapping action="delete_multiple" query="table=var__m_sys_flow_step_definition_input_106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7^id=01cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad30f"/><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=01cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad30f"/><sys_hub_step_ext_input action="delete_multiple" query="model=01cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad30f"/><sys_hub_step_ext_output action="delete_multiple" query="model=01cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad30f"/><sys_hub_input_scripts action="delete_multiple" query="instance=01cc610183b4cb1051759650ceaad30f"/><sys_hub_action_input action="delete_multiple" query="model=f59b2d4d8374cb1051759650ceaad3eb^sys_idNOT IN41ccad4d8374cb1051759650ceaad39d"/><sys_hub_action_input action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><array>false</array><array_denormalized>false</array_denormalized><attributes>element_mapping_provider=com.glide.flow_design.action.data.FlowDesignVariableMapper,uiType=reference,uiTypeLabel=Reference,uiUniqueId=38dbcc51-ad85-4a0d-8eb2-5ee7f1ea7c5f</attributes><audit>false</audit><calculation><![CDATA[(function calculatedFieldValue(current) {

action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_hub_step_instance</document><document_key>62cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad38a</document_key><order>600</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-10 06:28:38</sys_created_on><sys_id>2acca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad39a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-10 06:30:00</sys_updated_on><value>// Action 1: AI Classification

var incRec = inputs.incident_record;

var result = new EmergencyAIClassifier().classify(
    incRec.description,
    incRec.u_village
);

var gr = new GlideRecord('incident');

if (gr.get(incRec.sys_id)) {

    gr.setValue('u_village', result.village);

    gr.setValue('u_district', result.district);

    gr.setValue('u_emergency_type', result.emergency_type);

    gr.setValue('u_severity', result.severity);

    gr.setValue('u_ai_classification', result.summary);

    // Auto Priority Mapping

    if(result.severity == 'critical'){

        gr.setValue('impact', '1');
        gr.setValue('urgency', '1');
        gr.setValue('priority', '1');

    }
    else if(result.severity == 'high'){

        gr.setValue('impact', '1');
        gr.setValue('urgency', '2');
        gr.setValue('priority', '2');

    }
    else if(result.severity == 'medium'){

        gr.setValue('impact', '2');
        gr.setValue('urgency', '2');
        gr.setValue('priority', '3');

    }
    else{

        gr.setValue('impact', '3');
        gr.setValue('urgency', '3');
        gr.setValue('priority', '5');
    }

    gr.update();
}</value><variable display_value="Script">71aa7f6647032200b4fad7527c9a719b</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_hub_step_instance</document><document_key>62cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad38a</document_key><order>400</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-10 06:28:38</sys_created_on><sys_id>e2cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad39a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-10 06:28:38</sys_updated_on><value>35aa573fd7802200bdbaee5b5e610375</value><variable display_value="MID Application">f5e56d79b3101300176b051a16a8dce4</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_element_mapping action="delete_multiple" query="table=var__m_sys_flow_step_definition_input_106afb6647032200b4fad7527c9a71e7^id=62cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad38a"/><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=62cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad38a"/><sys_hub_step_ext_input action="delete_multiple" query="model=62cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad38a"/><sys_hub_step_ext_output action="delete_multiple" query="model=62cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad38a"/><sys_hub_input_scripts action="delete_multiple" query="instance=62cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad38a"/><sys_hub_action_input action="delete_multiple" query="model=6acca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad373^sys_idNOT IN22cca10183b4cb1051759650ceaad37b"/><sys_hub_action_input action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><array>false</array><array_denormalized>false</array_denormalized><attributes>element_mapping_provider=com.glide.flow_design.action.data.FlowDesignVariableMapper,uiType=reference,uiTypeLabel=Reference,uiUniqueId=38dbcc51-ad85-4a0d-8eb2-5ee7f1ea7c5f</attributes><audit>false</audit><calculation><![CDATA[(function calculatedFieldValue(current) {

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><admin_overrides>false</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description>Allow write for knowledge in incident when incident_state is closed/canceled, for users with role nobody.</description><local_or_existing/><name>incident.knowledge</name><operation display_value="write">write</operation><script><![CDATA[answer = true;
if ((current.incident_state == IncidentState.CLOSED || current.incident_state == IncidentState.CANCELED) && !gs.hasRole('nobody')) {
	answer = false;
}]]></script><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-02-14 10:01:39</sys_created_on><sys_id>0527cdceb7522010eeafbc16de11a970</sys_id><sys_mod_count>8</sys_mod_count><sys_name>incident.knowledge</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Incident Management Best Practice - Kingston" source="com.snc.best_practice.incident.kingston">3f22768a183a32108bb255f46a373a3b</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_0527cdceb7522010eeafbc16de11a970</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>system</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-03 04:46:45</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_security_acl_73e2b5ef9f03121057bda426da0a1cc2
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_security_acl"><sys_security_acl action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><admin_overrides>true</admin_overrides><advanced>true</advanced><applies_to/><condition/><controlled_by_refs/><decision_type>allow</decision_type><description>Default access control on sys_cs_message_tab_detail</description><local_or_existing>Local</local_or_existing><name>sys_cs_message_tab_detail</name><operation display_value="create">create</operation><script><![CDATA[answer = gs.getSession().isLoggedIn();
if (!answer) {
    answer = gs.getProperty('glide.security.allow_unauth_roleless_acl', false);

if (!answer) {
    answer = gs.getProperty('glide.security.allow_unauth_roleless_acl', false);
}]]></script><security_attribute/><sys_class_name>sys_security_acl</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2024-09-20 10:47:17</sys_created_on><sys_id>47da40c59f7412107107a426da0a1c5d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>information_session_tab_workspace_setting</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Omni-Experience Standard Feature Set" source="sn_oe_sfs">53b1b0e79761011018b2fa98c253afcc</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Omni-Experience Standard Feature Set">53b1b0e79761011018b2fa98c253afcc</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_security_acl_47da40c59f7412107107a426da0a1c5d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>system</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-03 05:22:56</sys_updated_on><type display_value="record">record</type></sys_security_acl></record_update>
